name: agentize
description: Make an agent. One line, any repo. Drops a .agent/ scaffold — personality, memory, bead-graph task ledger, and a 130-pattern knowledge catalog — into any codebase. Built by the Trilogy AI Center of Excellence. Tool-agnostic: Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenClaw, Aider, Windsurf. Also published as `youragent` (legacy alias — same package).

scripts.test:
tmp=/tmp/.agentize-test-$$ && rm -rf "$tmp" && mkdir -p "$tmp" && NO_ANIM=1 BOOTSTRAP_TARGET="$tmp/.agent" bash install.sh >/dev/null && printf '# IDENTITY.md

## Name

**Scribe** — maintainer agent for the agentize package itself

## Purpose

This agent exists to keep the agentize scaffold correct, useful, and shippable.
' > "$tmp/.agent/IDENTITY.md" && (cd "$tmp" && NO_ANIM=1 bash /Users/stanhus/youragent/install.sh status | grep -q 'Scribe') && (cd "$tmp" && NO_ANIM=1 bash /Users/stanhus/youragent/install.sh validate >/dev/null) && version=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && npm pack >/dev/null && mkdir -p "$tmp/home/.openclaw" "$tmp/atlas" && printf '{"agents":{"list":[{"workspace":"%s","identity":{"name":"Atlas"}}]}}
' "$tmp/atlas" > "$tmp/home/.openclaw/openclaw.json" && printf '# AGENTS
' > "$tmp/atlas/AGENTS.md" && HOME="$tmp/home" npm exec --yes --package "$PWD/agentize-$version.tgz" agentize -- configure-openclaw >/dev/null && grep -Fq 'youragent-openclaw-v1' "$tmp/atlas/AGENTS.md" && HOME="$tmp/home" npm exec --yes --package "$PWD/agentize-$version.tgz" agentize -- configure-openclaw >/dev/null && [ "$(grep -Fc 'youragent-openclaw-v1' "$tmp/atlas/AGENTS.md")" -eq 1 ] && rm -f "$PWD/agentize-$version.tgz" && rm -rf "$tmp"
